subcodes.first_line: O Nightingale of the Garden of Inner Meanings! Thy verses were eloquent and bore wondrous significances in praise of the threshold of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب حدیقه معانی اشعار فصیح معانی بدیع داشت و در ثنای آستان اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
